description_long: This is a small, round ceramic bowl with a wide, slightly flared rim and a deep, dark body. The exterior is predominantly black with a matte finish, contrasted by a cream-colored rim and interior. On one side, there is a square decorative motif featuring a stylized bear face outlined in black on a cream background, while the opposite side displays a similar square with two white paw prints and black lines above them. The bowl's surface shows some subtle textural variations and minor imperfections, suggesting it is handmade. The overall form is simple yet charming, with a playful touch from the animal-themed decorations.
description: A small, round ceramic bowl with a cream rim and black body, featuring playful bear and paw print motifs on its sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream rim and the bear face motif on the black body.
description_view_1: Side view with the cream rim visible and the bear motif partially seen, mostly showing the plain black surface.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the cream rim and the paw print motif on the black body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cream rim and mostly plain black surface, with the edge of the paw print motif visible.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding small portions of food, snacks, or condiments
attribute_decorative_patterns: Stylized bear face motif on one side and paw prints with black lines on the opposite side, both on cream-colored squares.
